title: capanea tigridia
intro: Capanea tigridia, also known as tiger flower or Mexican flame flower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its bright orange and red flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Capanea tigridia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Capanea tigridia is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
